title: Wael's Marketing/Sales Workflow
description: Tell me what Wael does so I can automate it. Be specific — tools, cadence, channels.

questions.question: How often does Wael post/do outreach? (e.g., '3 tweets/day, 1 LinkedIn/day, cold emails weekly')
What specifically is working for Wael? (e.g., 'thread-style posts about building in public', 'cold DMs to founders', 'demo videos')
What tools does Wael use? (e.g., Buffer, Mailchimp, Notion, spreadsheets, manual posting)
What's Wael's sales process? (e.g., 'DM → call → demo → close' or 'content → inbound → trial → convert')
